verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate Dominum de cælis ;  laudate eum in excelsis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽלְל֣וּ אֶת־יְ֭הֹוָה מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֑יִם הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בַּמְּרוֹמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Praise ye the Lord from the heavens: praise him in the heights.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum, omnes angeli ejus ;  laudate eum, omnes virtutes ejus.
verses.king_james: Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum, sol et luna ;  laudate eum, omnes stellæ et lumen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ שֶׁ֣מֶשׁ וְיָרֵ֑חַ הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ כׇּל־כּ֥וֹכְבֵי אֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Praise ye him, sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum, cæli cælorum ;  et aquæ omnes quæ super cælos sunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ שְׁמֵ֣י הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְ֝הַמַּ֗יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ מֵעַ֬ל הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that be above the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: laudent nomen Domini.  Quia ipse dixit, et facta sunt ;  ipse mandavit, et creata sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽ֭הַלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֤י ה֖וּא צִוָּ֣ה וְנִבְרָֽאוּ׃
verses.king_james: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for he commanded, and they were created.

verses.latin_vulgate: Statuit ea in æternum, et in sæculum sæculi ;  præceptum posuit, et non præteribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמִידֵ֣ם לָעַ֣ד לְעוֹלָ֑ם חׇק־נָ֝תַ֗ן וְלֹ֣א יַעֲבֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a decree which shall not pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate Dominum de terra,  dracones et omnes abyssi ;
verses.king_james: Praise the Lord from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps:

verses.latin_vulgate: ignis, grando, nix, glacies, spiritus procellarum,  quæ faciunt verbum ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣שׁ וּ֭בָרָד שֶׁ֣לֶג וְקִיט֑וֹר ר֥וּחַ סְ֝עָרָ֗ה עֹשָׂ֥ה דְבָרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Fire, and hail; snow, and vapour; stormy wind fulfilling his word:

verses.latin_vulgate: montes, et omnes colles ;  ligna fructifera, et omnes cedri ;
verses.king_james: Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars:

verses.latin_vulgate: bestiæ, et universa pecora ;  serpentes, et volucres pennatæ ;
verses.king_james: Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl:

verses.latin_vulgate: reges terræ et omnes populi ;  principes et omnes judices terræ ;
verses.king_james: Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth:

verses.latin_vulgate: juvenes et virgines ; senes cum junioribus,  laudent nomen Domini :
verses.king_james: Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children:

verses.latin_vulgate: quia exaltatum est nomen ejus solius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהַלְל֤וּ ׀ אֶת־שֵׁ֬ם יְהֹוָ֗ה כִּֽי־נִשְׂגָּ֣ב שְׁמ֣וֹ לְבַדּ֑וֹ ה֝וֹד֗וֹ עַל־אֶ֥רֶץ וְשָׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for his name alone is excellent; his glory is above the earth and heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confessio ejus super cælum et terram ;  et exaltavit cornu populi sui.  Hymnus omnibus sanctis ejus ;  filiis Israël, populo appropinquanti sibi.  Alleluja.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤רֶם קֶ֨רֶן ׀ לְעַמּ֡וֹ תְּהִלָּ֤ה לְֽכׇל־חֲסִידָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֣י יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל עַ֥ם קְרֹב֗וֹ הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye the Lord.
